\tzpentry{ID4548}{Quantum Magnetization Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4548 introduces Quantum Magnetization Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{M}_{\text{cat}} = \sum_{\mu} \left( \frac{-\hbar^2}{2m_{\mu}} \nabla^2 + V_{\text{coulomb}} \right) \otimes \exp\left( -\frac{r}{\alpha \lambda_{\mu}} \right) \end{equation}
